item.title: #ぼっち・ざ・ろっく 喜多郁代(ダーウィンが喜多ver.) 最近ぼざろの絵が多くなってますね。。 来週は出来れば違う二次…

item.title: Happy Cirno Sunday! The current vibe is thinking about the P…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: Happy Cirno Sunday! The current vibe is thinking about the Pop Team Epic anime! ngl Pop Team Epic was so amazing 🥹 the first season is one of the funniest things I've ever seen, and the opening was beautiful, it was immaculate 😭 I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️
item.content:encoded: Happy Cirno Sunday! The current vibe is thinking about the Pop Team Epic anime! ngl Pop Team Epic was so amazing 🥹 the first season is one of the funniest things I've ever seen, and the opening was beautiful, it was immaculate 😭 I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️

明日は休みなり。。
今日も暑かった…🫠

item.title: British police arrested a 28-year-old man on Saturday in con…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: British police arrested a 28-year-old man on Saturday in connection with the killing of Ann Widdecombe, a longtime Conservative member of Parliament, who was found dead at her home in southwest England last week. Another man arrested on Friday was later released.
item.content:encoded: British police arrested a 28-year-old man on Saturday in connection with the killing of Ann Widdecombe, a longtime Conservative member of Parliament, who was found dead at her home in southwest England last week. Another man arrested on Friday was later released.

item.title: I played Echo Isle! The game took little under 1.5 hours to …
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: I played Echo Isle! The game took little under 1.5 hours to beat. This was an insanely cool game! The game did an amazing job of emulating the look and feel of an old school Zelda game, everything from the graphics to the gameplay were spot on! It was a really fun, charming, and nostalgic game!
item.content:encoded: I played Echo Isle! The game took little under 1.5 hours to beat. This was an insanely cool game! The game did an amazing job of emulating the look and feel of an old school Zelda game, everything from the graphics to the gameplay were spot on! It was a really fun, charming, and nostalgic game!

おはようさん⚡️🐰

ラジオ本放送の日📻
大正14年に東京放送局
現NHKが開始したみたい

今はラジオもネット経由も
多いかもね

今日もヨロシクお願いします🤗💝

#うちの子

item.title: -阿良々木くん、仮装するのにどうしてそんなに時間がかかるの？ -もう着たんだけど、トイレから出るのが恥ずかしいんだ …
item.author: エルさん (Eru-san) (@bsdmoe.bsky.social)
item.description:
-阿良々木くん、仮装するのにどうしてそんなに時間がかかるの？

-もう着たんだけど、トイレから出るのが恥ずかしいんだ

-さあ、恥ずかしがらないで、阿良々木くん。神原ちゃんと出かけるのが怖くなかったんだから、仮装して出かけるくらい怖くないでしょ

-でも、何言ってるの？！ ショッピングモールに行く途中で彼女に偶然会っただけだよ

-本当なら、何があっても仮装したまま出てきてよ

-でも、これ、子供用のゴジラの仮装だよ！

-でも、すごく可愛く似合ってるよ

-君にはそう見えるかもしれないけど、僕には恥ずかしいよ

#戦場ヶ原ひたぎ #阿良々木暦 #化物語 #物語シリーズ #コスプレ #ゴジラ
item.content:encoded:
-阿良々木くん、仮装するのにどうしてそんなに時間がかかるの？

-もう着たんだけど、トイレから出るのが恥ずかしいんだ

-さあ、恥ずかしがらないで、阿良々木くん。神原ちゃんと出かけるのが怖くなかったんだから、仮装して出かけるくらい怖くないでしょ

-でも、何言ってるの？！ ショッピングモールに行く途中で彼女に偶然会っただけだよ

-本当なら、何があっても仮装したまま出てきてよ

-でも、これ、子供用のゴジラの仮装だよ！

-でも、すごく可愛く似合ってるよ

-君にはそう見えるかもしれないけど、僕には恥ずかしいよ

#戦場ヶ原ひたぎ #阿良々木暦 #化物語 #物語シリーズ #コスプレ #ゴジラ

item.title: おはようございます！(:D)┓ 【飛鳥山下跨線人道橋】 右側は京浜東北線の王子駅です。金網のスキマから撮影。E257系…
item.author: ヂーゼル機関車《masashi》 (@dieselloco.bsky.social)
item.description:
おはようございます！(:D)┓
【飛鳥山下跨線人道橋】
　右側は京浜東北線の王子駅です。金網のスキマから撮影。E257系5000番台 団体臨時列車[修学旅行] 横浜方面。臨時列車（波動輸送）で見かける車両ですね。
　自分はひとり旅がいいかな～、いろいろ予定通りにいかないやつ。夏はどこか旅行にいきますか？
#鉄道 #railway
item.content:encoded:
おはようございます！(:D)┓
【飛鳥山下跨線人道橋】
　右側は京浜東北線の王子駅です。金網のスキマから撮影。E257系5000番台 団体臨時列車[修学旅行] 横浜方面。臨時列車（波動輸送）で見かける車両ですね。
　自分はひとり旅がいいかな～、いろいろ予定通りにいかないやつ。夏はどこか旅行にいきますか？
#鉄道 #railway

item.title: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Gianni Infantino said FIFA …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Gianni Infantino said FIFA will examine expanding the World Cup by a further 16 nations to a 64-team tournament ahead of its next edition in 2030. The 2030 tournament will be spread across six nations and three continents. nyti.ms/4pmQ1Fu
item.content:encoded: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Gianni Infantino said FIFA will examine expanding the World Cup by a further 16 nations to a 64-team tournament ahead of its next edition in 2030. The 2030 tournament will be spread across six nations and three continents. nyti.ms/4pmQ1Fu

item.title: I’ve never wished a man dead, but I have read some obituarie…
item.author: Aaron Meyers (@aaronmeyers.bsky.social)
item.description: I’ve never wished a man dead, but I have read some obituaries with great pleasure.
item.content:encoded: I’ve never wished a man dead, but I have read some obituaries with great pleasure.

item.title: Apropos of absolutely nothing at all, that Mark Twain quote …
item.author: Dr Emma Salisbury (@salisbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
Apropos of absolutely nothing at all, that Mark Twain quote was actually from Clarence Darrow, and it's:

"I have never killed any one, but I have read some obituary notices with great satisfaction."
item.content:encoded:
Apropos of absolutely nothing at all, that Mark Twain quote was actually from Clarence Darrow, and it's:

"I have never killed any one, but I have read some obituary notices with great satisfaction."

item.title: “You own everything that happened to you. Tell your stories.…
item.author: Claire Connelly (@claireconnelly.bsky.social)
item.description: “You own everything that happened to you. Tell your stories. If people wanted you to write warmly of them, they should have behaved better” - Anne Lamott
item.content:encoded: “You own everything that happened to you. Tell your stories. If people wanted you to write warmly of them, they should have behaved better” - Anne Lamott

item.title: The Defense Dept. has a rule: Only U.S. citizens or permanen…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
The Defense Dept. has a rule: Only U.S. citizens or permanent residents can handle sensitive data.

Then Microsoft created a workaround that seemed to violate the spirit of this rule, leaving computer systems vulnerable to Chinese government sabotage:
item.content:encoded:
The Defense Dept. has a rule: Only U.S. citizens or permanent residents can handle sensitive data.

Then Microsoft created a workaround that seemed to violate the spirit of this rule, leaving computer systems vulnerable to Chinese government sabotage:

item.title: “The American Bible Society found the Bible is the best self…
item.author: ffrf.org (@ffrf.org)
item.description:
“The American Bible Society found the Bible is the best self-care.”

That’s about as surprising as Coca-Cola publishing a study saying Coke is the healthiest drink.

cbn.com/news/health/...
item.content:encoded:
“The American Bible Society found the Bible is the best self-care.”

That’s about as surprising as Coca-Cola publishing a study saying Coke is the healthiest drink.

cbn.com/news/health/...

item.title: Anna's Hummingbird feathers contain no pigment at all. Their…
item.author: Digital Brain (@yourdigitalbrain.bsky.social)
item.description: Anna's Hummingbird feathers contain no pigment at all. Their intense magenta glow comes entirely from hollow melanosomes refracting light like a prism.
item.content:encoded: Anna's Hummingbird feathers contain no pigment at all. Their intense magenta glow comes entirely from hollow melanosomes refracting light like a prism.

item.title: Thank you so much for 70K followers! I am most thankful for …
item.author: Christoph Fischer Photography (@beautysurroundsyou.com)
item.description:
Thank you so much for 70K followers! I am most thankful for all the kindness, support & amazing art here on #bluesky ! In celebration, I'm sharing an unforgettable sunrise in Canada's Thousand Islands region!

#photography #landscape #nature #mountains #naturephotography #landscapephotography
item.content:encoded:
Thank you so much for 70K followers! I am most thankful for all the kindness, support & amazing art here on #bluesky ! In celebration, I'm sharing an unforgettable sunrise in Canada's Thousand Islands region!

#photography #landscape #nature #mountains #naturephotography #landscapephotography
